CustomField.description: Northstar: the bare lower-case domain of Website, used by Northstar_Account_Match to dedupe on domain rather than the full URL (https://example.com/pricing and http://www.example.com both reduce to example.com). Plain text (NOT a formula) because Salesforce matching rules reject formula fields as match criteria; populated on every save by the Account_Before_Save_Set_Website_Domain before-save flow, which strips the protocol, a leading www., and any path/query/fragment (from the first /, ?, or #). Blank Website yields blank.
CustomField.label: Website Domain
